task: AI-4: extend the accounting-period seed to full p4-periods-balances coverage (2025 + 2026, TRANSP + TRK). 202606080210 seeded only TRANSP Jan-Jun 2026; this adds TRANSP Jul-Dec 2026 + all 2025, and TRK all 2025 + all 2026 (USMCA excluded until July 2026). Portable (companies resolved by org.companies.code, NOT hardcoded UUIDs), idempotent (ON CONFLICT (operating_company_id, period_start) DO NOTHING), months via generate_series (no leap-year math). Gated behind the same PERIODS_INIT_ENABLED confirm flag — CI/prod stay empty until ops enables it. Tracker AI-4 row updated in this PR.
